description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior is clad in dark gray panels, complemented by large, rectangular windows that provide ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a tall, manicured hedge, offering privacy and a touch of greenery. The front features a small porch with potted plants, a driveway with a parked car, and a row of trees along the sidewalk. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor seating and additional landscaping, while the side yard has a paved path and more trees. The overall aesthetic is clean, contemporary, and well-integrated with its urban surroundings.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, dark gray exterior, large windows, and surrounded by manicured hedges and trees. Features include a front porch, driveway, and a landscaped backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large windows, potted plants, and the hedge-lined property boundary.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard patio area, outdoor seating, and additional landscaping with trees and hedges.
description_view_2: Street-facing view with the driveway, parked car, front porch, and a row of trees along the sidewalk.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the hedge enclosure, paved path, and a mix of trees and patio furniture in the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a small porch, potted plants, and no overhang, framed by hedges and a paved path.
